To Continue The Jurisdiction Of The Arbitrator
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for defendant and Moving Party. Defendant's Motion to Extend the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is heard this day. Court ordered motion granted. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 3/29/02. The Arbitration/OSC is re-set to 4/18/02 at 1:30 PM. Court signed order. Proceedings reported by: Kent Gubbine. (212)
